lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is flawless with no damage or cosmetic blemishes. The interior is in like-new condition with no signs of wear. The engine and transmission are in perfect working order.
Poor condition.

Get ready to hit the road in this fantastic vehicle that strikes the perfect balance between comfort and performance! It has been well-maintained and remains in great condition, showing only the expected signs of light use. With its solid reliability and clean presentation, this car is a wonderful find for anyone looking for a dependable and stylish ride.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained by its previous owner. The exterior paint still holds a great luster, though upon close inspection, you will find a few minor stone chips on the hood and a small scuff on the rear bumper from normal use. The interior is clean and smoke-free, showing only light wear on the driver's seat upholstery and floor mats. All mechanical systems are in strong working order, with a documented service history and a recent brake inspection. It offers a smooth ride and reliable performance, making it an excellent choice for someone looking for a quality vehicle that has been treated with care.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-maintained. The engine runs reliably and the transmission shifts smoothly through all gears, with no major mechanical issues to report. The interior is clean, though it shows minor signs of use on the upholstery, and all electrical features are fully operational. On the exterior, the paint still holds a nice shine, with only a few small stone chips and light scratches consistent with regular driving. It has a solid maintenance history and is ready to be a dependable daily driver for its next owner.
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor cosmetic wear, and the interior is well-maintained with light signs of use. It is mechanically sound and has received regular service.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an impeccable standard that defies its year of manufacture. This specimen exhibits flawless paintwork and a pristine interior, reflecting a history of fastidious ownership and climate-controlled storage. Mechanically superior and aesthetically indistinguishable from new, it offers a definitive driving experience for the most discerning enthusiast seeking showroom-caliber quality.

Hey there! Are you ready to fall in love with your next ride? I'm parting ways with my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, it looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been pampered since day one, kept in a climate-controlled garage, and driven very gently. No scratches, no smells, just pure driving bliss. You seriously won't find one in better shape—it's practically perfect! Come take a look and see for yourself, you won't be disappointed! ✨

Offered is a pristine 2011 BMW M3 (E92) featuring the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8. This high-revving power unit delivers a linear power band up to its 8,400 RPM redline, optimized by eight individual throttle bodies for instantaneous response. Mated to a lightning-fast 7-speed M-DCT dual-clutch transmission and a variable M differential lock, the vehicle offers unparalleled lateral dynamics. The chassis is equipped with Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and remains in factory-spec alignment. This collector-grade example shows no bolster wear or exterior imperfections, with documented preventative maintenance on rod bearings and throttle
Mint condition. Garage kept. Original paint. No mechanical issues. Clean title.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence, this vehicle is in showroom condition and has been maintained to the highest possible standards. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish on the original factory paint, entirely free of stone chips, swirls, or imperfections. Inside, the premium leather upholstery remains supple and pristine, still carrying that distinct new-car scent, with every electronic component and convenience feature functioning flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is peerless; it has been exclusively serviced at authorized dealerships with a comprehensive folder of maintenance records to prove its pampered history. Always garage-kept under a breathable cover and never driven in inclement weather, the undercarriage is as clean as the bodywork. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a vehicle that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Serious inquiries only for this investment-grade machine.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, having been preserved with fastidious attention to detail. Its aesthetic and mechanical integrity reflect a standard of excellence rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. An acquisition for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this impeccably preserved vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen in showroom condition, featuring a flawless exterior and a pristine interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance and reliability, offering an unparalleled driving experience for the discerning collector.

Hey there! I’m parting with my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in truly pristine, showroom condition—honestly, it looks and smells brand new! I've babied it since day one, keeping it tucked away in the garage and making sure every inch stays spotless. It drives like an absolute dream and is ready for a new home. You won't find a single scratch or dent anywhere. Come take a look, you're going to love it!

Offering a museum-grade E46 M3, this specimen features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides tactile, precise engagement, paired with a limited-slip variable M differential lock for optimal torque distribution. This vehicle has undergone a comprehensive subframe reinforcement and a documented rod bearing service, ensuring structural and mechanical longevity. The suspension geometry remains true with zero bushing deflection, providing the telepathic steering response these chassis are known for. The exterior retains its factory luster with no oxidative degradation, while the interior preserves the original bolster integrity and switchgear tactile feel. A turn-key investment for the purist seeking mechanical perfection.
2022 Sedan. Mint condition. Single owner. Full service history. Garage kept. No accidents. Pristine interior.

This vehicle is an absolute masterpiece of preservation, presenting in true showroom condition. The exterior finish retains its deep, mirror-like luster, free from any swirls, chips, or imperfections, having been strictly garage-kept and hand-washed. Inside, the cabin feels as if it just rolled off the assembly line; the premium leather remains supple with zero creasing, the carpets are spotless, and every electronic feature operates with precision. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, boasting a meticulous service record with all maintenance performed ahead of schedule. From the crisp engine note to the seamless gear transitions, this car offers a driving experience indistinguishable from new. A rare find for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection.
